frictions.description: Playwright agent-browser click commands timeout when clicking bingo board squares, even on fresh unmarked boards. The first click on a square works, but subsequent chained clicks (e.g., @e2 && @e3) time out. This appears unrelated to celebration overlay.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript eval to dispatch click() events on DOM buttons directly instead of Playwright click commands. This worked reliably for all 8 assertions.

frictions.description: SessionStorage must be cleared AND page reloaded between tests to reset React state. Simply clearing sessionStorage via eval without reloading leaves stale React state.
frictions.resolution: Used pattern: eval sessionStorage.clear() → open URL → eval click buttons. This ensures fresh React state for each test.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Every bingo line type (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals) correctly triggers bingo detection with 🎉 BINGO! 🎉 celebration heading when all 5 squares in the line are marked. No console errors observed during any test. Playwright click timeouts required JS-based click workaround.
